case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. MARVIN WATTS,III et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ANGELA C. DAWSON RE: CCP 585 DEC FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
